query:
INSERT INTO approval_grants (
                    id,
                    deployment_id,
                    policy_id,
                    actor_id,
                    project_id,
                    thread_id,
                    tool_id,
                    granted_by_message_id,
                    grant_scope,
                    status,
                    granted_at,
                    expires_at,
                    consumed_at,
                    consumed_by_run_id,
                    metadata
                )
                VALUES (
                    $1, $2, NULL, NULL, NULL, $3, $4, NULL, $5, $6, $7, NULL, NULL, NULL,
                    '{}'::jsonb
                )
                RETURNING
                    id,
                    deployment_id,
                    policy_id,
                    actor_id,
                    project_id,
                    thread_id,
                    tool_id,
                    granted_by_message_id,
                    grant_scope,
                    status,
                    granted_at,
                    expires_at,
                    consumed_at,
                    consumed_by_run_id,
                    metadata
